sections.title: Results
sections.content: Our chunking pipeline reduces noisy one-line fragments and preserves retrieval-relevant paragraphs. It also separates prose from captions and structured artifacts more consistently.

lines.text: Our chunking pipeline reduces noisy one-line fragments
